article_title: Spec-Driven Development：AI 原生工程要先对齐意图
core_theme: Spec-Driven Development 把结构化规格作为人和 AI 的共同事实源，用来减少需求、设计、实现和验证之间的意图丢失。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解为什么 prompt-first 在复杂项目中容易失真，以及如何用小范围试点开始 spec-first 工作流。
summary_angle: 从散落 prompt 到共享规格，再到实现和验证回环，说明 SDD 的核心价值是先对齐意图再加速执行。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Why prompt-first workflows are not enough
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧散落便签和断裂箭头，表示 prompt-first 下的架构漂移、代码漂移和返工。
中央发光规格蓝图承载 guardrails、requirements、constraints、acceptance criteria 和 edge cases。
右侧代码块、测试检查和发布门禁形成回到规格的验证闭环。

main_metaphor: 一张活的规格蓝图连接产品、架构、工程、AI 代理、测试和发布验证
primary_subject: 中心工作台上的发光结构化规格蓝图
subject_action: 把散落的 prompt 输入收束成 AI 可以执行并验证的工程上下文
composition: 宽幅 2.35:1，左侧意图丢失，中央共享规格，右侧实现与验证闭环
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: dynamic cinematic storyboard style, sequential panels, camera-motion feeling, strong cuts, clear narrative beats
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；文章主线是从问题到机制再到验证的三段式判断，适合用分镜式叙事表达。
style_safety_note: 该风格为泛分镜和电影构图描述，不涉及特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家复刻。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证 SDD 的三段式主线、中心规格蓝图和短标签可读性。
revision_targets: 减少可见文字到 3 个中文短标签。
去掉底部长信息栏和伪 UI 流程列表。
强化中心规格蓝图和右侧验证闭环。
final_prompt:
Regenerate a simpler wide cover illustration for the same Chinese tech blog article.

Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1
Primary request: Summarize Spec-Driven Development as a spec-first approach to AI-native engineering. The cover must be simpler than a dashboard and must not look like a UI screenshot.

Summary angle: scattered prompts lose intent; a shared living spec aligns humans and AI; implementation is validated back against the spec.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process with one dominant focal subject and only 3 supporting beats.
Information blocks, use only these labels if any text appears:
- problem: scattered prompt notes and broken arrows cause translation loss; visible label "意图丢失".
- mechanism: one central living spec blueprint becomes the shared source of truth; visible label "共享规格".
- validation: code and tests loop back to the spec through clear check gates; visible label "闭环验证".

Main metaphor: a central living blueprint document on a worktable, connecting product, architecture, engineering, AI agent, tests, and release validation.
Subject: one large luminous spec blueprint in the center, with humans and small AI assistant icons around it, and a clean loop from blueprint to code blocks to test checks back to blueprint.
Composition/framing: wide 2.35:1. Left third: a small cluster of messy prompt sticky notes with broken arrows. Center: dominant spec blueprint as the largest focal object. Right third: a simple validation loop with code blocks, test checkmarks, and release gate. No bottom information panels. No stacked UI rows. No dashboard cards.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with dynamic cinematic storyboard style: sequential visual beats, clear narrative rhythm, polished but restrained, not a fake product interface. Do not imitate any brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: charcoal background, off-white blueprint, restrained blue accent, green validation accent, small amber warning accent.
Visible text policy: allow at most 3 short Chinese labels total: "意图丢失", "共享规格", "闭环验证". Each label must be large and readable. No other readable text, no English, no menu labels, no workflow row labels, no tiny captions, no poster title.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake terminal output, no fake chart axes, no dense HUD, no unrelated icon collage, no bottom legend, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: generic robot mascot, code rain, neon city, GitHub UI screenshot, Microsoft UI screenshot, long process checklist, dense text panels, fake software interface.
